refund.process: Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

cancellation.notes: Customers retain access until the end of the current billing period. Data is deleted after 90 days unless export is requested.

triggers: Customer requests to speak with a manager
Three or more unresolved contacts in 30 days
escalation.routing: Escalate to the Senior Support team via internal ticket tagged 'ESCALATE'. Response SLA: 4 business hours.
